parameters.name: noiselookupattrib
parameters.label: Noise Lookup Attribute
parameters.description: Point input attribute to use when computing the noise.

parameters.name: type
parameters.label: Type
parameters.description: Determines the noise type.

parameters.name: noisesize
parameters.label: Noise Size
parameters.description: Number of noise components to compute.

parameters.name: seed
parameters.label: Seed
parameters.description: Numerical value that initializes the randomization.

parameters.name: period
parameters.label: Period
parameters.description: Period (scale) of the noise field.

parameters.name: harmon
parameters.label: Harmonics
parameters.description: The number of higher frequency components to layer on top of the base frequency. 0 harmonics give the base shape.

parameters.name: spread
parameters.label: Harmonic Spread
parameters.description: The factor by which the frequency of a harmonic increases relative to the previous harmonic.

parameters.name: gain
parameters.label: Harmonic Gain
parameters.description: Amplitude of the Harmonics layered on top of the base frequency.

parameters.name: parsize
parameters.label: Parameter Size
parameters.description: Number of independent configurable parameter values.

parameters.name: attrclass
parameters.label: Attribute Class
parameters.description: Makes the operate on point attributes, vertex attributes or primitive attributes where applicable.

parameters.name: group
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: If there are input groups, specifying a group name in this field will cause this to act only upon the group specified.

parameters.name: xord
parameters.label: Transform Order
parameters.description: Sets the overall transform order for the transformations.

parameters.name: rord
parameters.label: Rotate Order
parameters.description: Sets the order of the rotations within the overall transform order.

parameters.name: t4d
parameters.label: Translate 4D
parameters.description: Translates the points through the 4th noise dimension.

parameters.name: noise
parameters.label: Noise
parameters.description: Enable the addition of the noise attribute.

parameters.name: gradient
parameters.label: Gradient
parameters.description: Whether to output the noise gradient.

parameters.name: curl3d
parameters.label: Curl 3D
parameters.description: Whether to output the 3D curl of the noise.

parameters.name: curl2d
parameters.label: Curl 2D
parameters.description: Whether to output the 2D curl of the noise.

parameters.name: combineop
parameters.label: Combine Operation
parameters.description: Specify how to combine the output value with the combine attribute value.

parameters.name: combineentity
parameters.label: Combine Entity
parameters.description: Specify which computed value to use for the combine operation.

parameters.name: combineattrscope
parameters.label: Combine Attribute Scope
parameters.description: Input attribute scope for the combine operation.

parameters.name: outputattrscope
parameters.label: Output Attribute Scope
parameters.description: Name of attribute to output (can choose components of attribute), can choose from menu.

parameters.name: overrideautoattr
parameters.label: Override Automatic Attribute
parameters.description: Whether to override the kind of attribute automatically created based on the input and parameters. Allows to specify manually the type and number of components of the new attribute.

parameters.name: attrtype
parameters.label: Attribute Type
parameters.description: The output attribute's data type, default float.

parameters.name: attrnumcomps
parameters.label: Components
parameters.description: The number of components in the new custom attribute.

parameters.name: computenormals
parameters.label: Compute Point Normals
parameters.description: Whether to compute point normals as a post operation.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.label: Mode
parameters.description: Selects the shape of the field.

parameters.name: map
parameters.label: Mapping
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for attribute-to-parameter mapping.

parameters.name: map0op
parameters.label: OP
parameters.description: Source OP for parameter mapping. The default of _in0 means the input .

parameters.name: map0element
parameters.label: Element
parameters.description: The attribute (or component of an attribute) that will be mapped to a parameter per-point.

parameters.name: map0parm
parameters.label: Parameter
parameters.description: Parameter on the current that will be mapped from the Element (the attribute).

parameters.name: map0combineop
parameters.label: Combine Operation
parameters.description: Combine operation for attribute value with parameter value.

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.

parameters.name: curl2doutputattscope
parameters.label: Curl2Doutputattscope
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: gradientoutputattscope0derivoutputattscope
parameters.label: Gradientoutputattscope0Derivoutputattscope
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: attrdefaultval3
parameters.label: Attrdefaultval3
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: noiseoutputattscope
parameters.label: Noiseoutputattscope
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: curl3doutputattscope
parameters.label: Curl3Doutputattscope
parameters.description: Help Not Available.
